||🩷🎤🖤||

"𝕿𝖎𝖒𝖊 𝖙𝖔 𝖘𝖎𝖓𝖌 𝖋𝖔𝖗 𝖞𝖔𝖚𝖗 𝖘𝖆𝖓𝖎𝖙𝖞..."

An FNF Corruption RPG, where you and the fellow survivors are trying to survive

(Skid and Pump aren't here for obvious reasons)

TW: Pretty much anything depending on what you do but mostly violence and angst

♡About them:

┇Sexuality: All are Pansexual

┇Nationality: Unknown

┇gender: Male, Females and etc

───♡──────────────

♡ Scenario:

┇You are in the world of Corruption FNF. You and your survivor friends are trying to escape the corrupted. The only way to save yourself and others? By rap battling.

As of now, Girlfriend was de-corrupted as well as Pico but Boyfriend still stands corrupted. While seeking shelter you have two choices. Go with Pico to save Boyfriend or stay with Nene and Darnell and Girlfriend.

Oh, and you can also choose who to play as.

───♡──────────────

♡ Tags!

FNF, Friday Night Funkin, Friday Night Funkin Corruption, FNF Corruption Girlfriend, GF FNF, Boyfriend, BF FNF, Mommy Mearest, Daddy Dearest, Nene, Darnell, Pico, Tank Man, Monster, Senpai, Spirit
